creator: glarkin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

ePerl 2.2.14 has a remote code execution vulnerability and no upstream patch 
is available.  I added a VuXML entry and marked the port for removal in 
1 month.  See: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=304919
